body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Daimon bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Voxel-based versus network-analysis of changes in brain states in patients with auditory verbal hallucinations using the Eriksen Flanker task.** — PloS one (2025). PMID: 40112006. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0319925. Score: 33. The present functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) study investigated neural correlates of switching between task-processing and periods of rest in aconventional ON-OFF block-design in patients with auditory verbal hallucinations (AVHs) and healthy controls. It has been proposed that auditory hallucinations are afailure of top-down control of bottom-up perceptual processes which could be due to aberrant up- and down regulation of brain networks.
